title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
